name: ecosystem_health_check
description: Token health check and risk analysis for any token on Base chain. Returns red flags fast. Input: tokenAddress (0x...). Output fields: healthScore (0-100), flags[], priceUsd, metrics {liquidityUsd, volume24h, fdv, txns24h {buys, sells}, priceChange24h, pairAgeDays}, dataSource, pairAddress, dex. Powered by Codex (Defined.fi) + DEXScreener — sees bonding curve and DEX pairs. Use cases: token due diligence, is this token safe, DeFi risk assessment, liquidity check, rug pull detection. Triggers: token health, check token, token risk, token analysis, is token safe, token flags.

tokenAddress.description: Token contract address on Base chain (0x...)
